name: 120W LED Rotatable Wall Pack Light AC 120-277V CCT 5000K
description: ZION LED USA 120W Rotatable LED Wall Pack Light Light up large outdoor areas with ZION LED USA’s powerful 120W Rotatable Wall Pack Light . Designed for flexibility and durability, this fixture delivers bright, clear 5000K daylight and allows you to adjust each module for precise coverage. Perfect for commercial, industrial, and residential settings. Great For: Building Exteriors & Facades Commercial & Industrial Facilities Parking Lots & Perimeters Warehouses Residential Complexes Security & Wall Washing Applications
short_desc: Product Highlights: High Output: 120W of power for wide, effective coverage Adjustable Modules: NEMA 4×4 distribution per module for customizable lighting 5000K Color Temperature: Bright, natural daylight for maximum visibility Durable Build: Die-cast aluminum housing and silicone-sealed polycarbonate lens Thermal Management: Built-in heat sinks for long-lasting performance Easy Installation: Mounts to most standard junction boxes 0-10V Dimmable: Optional dimmer compatible IP65 Rated: Weatherproof design for reliable outdoor use Voltage Range: Operates on 120-277V AC UL & DLC 5.1 Premium Certified 5-Year Warranty
